title: M.Y 50cm Smiley Face Space Hopper Kangaroo Ball Age 3+
features: Easy to use: The space hopper has a large, easy to grip handle that makes the space hopper easy to use for any ability
Outdoor fun: A great way to get kids active and enjoying the outdoors, especially in the warmer summer months! Fun for both boys and girls alike! Can also be used indoors.
Exercise that feels like fun! Help to develop a sense of balance and improve coordination as well as encouraging an active lifestyle
Easy to Inflate, Space hopper inflates to approximately 50 cm
description: Kids Kangaroo Ball Smiley Face Space Hopper - the classic space hopper toy with easy to grip handles for any ability. A great way to get kids active and enjoying the outdoors, especially in the warmer summer months! It can even be used indoors in a large clear space. Fun for both girls and boys alike, it's exercise but it doesn't feel like it! Help to develop a keen sense of balance and coordination as well as encouraging an active lifestyle. Inflates to Approximately 50 cm, arrives Deflated Adult Supervision Advised
